message:
test(e2e): add filter chips, performance, and accessibility tests

- Add Active Filter Chips tests (4 tests) for category/tag chip visibility and removal
- Add Filter Performance test to ensure operations complete within acceptable time
- Add Filter Accessibility tests (3 tests) for keyboard navigation and aria-labels

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-mqm6
